prompt:
Reference image role: the project detail prototype defines the visual DNA — moonlit tree-hollow research chamber with an open ancient technical scroll on a low wooden desk, a round paper moon-window high on the wall, hanging lanterns, restrained Eastern xianxia mood. PRESERVE this DNA. Hero is shorter than the home page (about half the height).

Create a wide hero background for the project detail page top section of "夕丰木". 16:9 wide format but composition should feel like a banner.

Composition:
- Right 55%: A scholar研究室 inside the tree hollow. A low dark wood desk with an open ancient scroll covered in faint geometric diagrams and small glowing runes (suggesting technical content). A large round paper moon-window high above showing cool moonlight #b8d4e0 over distant mountains. Two warm lanterns hanging on the cave arch. Mossy vines.
- Left 45%: Dark, intentionally empty atmospheric area — reserved for project title (e.g., "Triton & CUDA 核心原理整理"), tags, metadata, and action buttons to be overlaid by HTML. NO text, NO UI in this image.

Color HEX: base #0B211D, wood #24180F, moss #33513A, lantern #ddb87a, moonlight #b8d4e0, firefly #9CF0BD, gold #C0A35D.

Avoid: people, text, characters on the scroll that read as real letters, browser chrome, neon, purple, red, MMORPG, oversaturated.
